  ],
  "text": "Apache Kafka's plugin/extension loading system is implemented through a sophisticated class isolation and dependency injection architecture located primarily in the connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ package and related connect/api package.\n\n**Core Plugin Loading Infrastructure:**\nThe system uses three key classloaders: PluginClassLoader (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java) extends URLClassLoader and loads plugin classes with isolation, DelegatingClassLoader (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) extends URLClassLoader to coordinate plugin loading, and ClassLoaderFactory (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java) which implements PluginClassLoaderFactory (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java) to create classloader instances.\n\n**Plugin Scanning via Reflection:**\nPlugin discovery uses two parallel scanning mechanisms: ReflectionScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java) uses ClassGraph library with reflection to scan all classes implementing plugin interfaces, and ServiceLoaderScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java) uses Java's ServiceLoader mechanism for META-INF/services discovery. Both extend PluginScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java) and return PluginScanResult (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java) containing discovered plugin descriptors.\n\n**Plugin Descriptors and Type System:**\nEach discovered plugin is represented as a PluginDesc (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java) generic descriptor containing class information and version metadata. PluginType (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java) enum defines supported plugin categories: SOURCE, SINK, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, CONFIGPROVIDER, REST_EXTENSION, and CONNECTOR_CLIENT_POLICY. PluginSource (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java) record represents a plugin location with its associated classloader and URLs.\n\n**Interface-Based Dependency Injection:**\nThe system supports dependency injection through standard Java interfaces defined in connect/api. Core connector interfaces are Connector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java) base interface, SinkConnector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java) and SourceConnector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java) for data movement. Serialization plugins include Converter (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java) for schema and payload conversion, and HeaderConverter (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java) for header conversion.\n\nTransformation plugins include Transformation (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java) for record transformations, and Predicate (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java) for conditional transformation application. Extension plugins include ConnectRestExtension (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java) registered with ConnectRestExtensionContext (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtensionContext.java), ConfigProvider (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java) for external configuration, and ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java) for enforcing client configuration policies.\n\n**Plugin Management and Utility Classes:**\nThe Plugins class (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade managing plugin initialization, discovery, and instantiation. PluginUtils (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java) provides helper methods including shouldLoadInIsolation() for determining isolation requirements, isConcrete() for validation, and pluginLocations() for path parsing. PluginDiscoveryMode (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) enum controls whether to use reflection scanning (ONLY_SCAN), service loading, or hybrid modes (HYBRID_WARN, HYBRID_FAIL, SERVICE_LOAD). LoaderSwap (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java) provides thread-safe context classloader swapping during plugin operations.\n\n**Configuration:**\nWorkerConfig (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/WorkerConfig.java) defines plugin-related configuration properties including PLUGIN_PATH_CONFIG, PLUGIN_DISCOVERY_CONFIG for discovery mode selection, and REST_EXTENSION_CLASSES_CONFIG. Additional metadata classes include VersionedPluginLoadingException (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java) for version-related errors and PluginsRecommenders (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) for configuration recommendations."
}

conversation_events.text:
# IMPORTANT: Source Code Access

**Local source files are not present.** Your workspace does not contain source code. You **MUST** use Sourcegraph MCP tools to discover, read, and understand code before making any changes.

Use `sg_list_repos` to discover available repositories before searching.


## Required Workflow

1. **Search first** — Use MCP tools to find relevant files and understand existing patterns
2. **Read remotely** — Use `sg_read_file` to read full file contents from Sourcegraph
3. **Edit locally** — Use Edit, Write, and Bash to create or modify files in your working directory
4. **Verify locally** — Run tests with Bash to check your changes

## Tool Selection

| Goal | Tool |
|------|------|
| Exact symbol/string | `sg_keyword_search` |
| Concepts/semantic search | `sg_nls_search` |
| Trace usage/callers | `sg_find_references` |
| See implementation | `sg_go_to_definition` |
| Read full file | `sg_read_file` |
| Browse structure | `sg_list_files` |
| Find repos | `sg_list_repos` |
| Search commits | `sg_commit_search` |
| Track changes | `sg_diff_search` |
| Compare versions | `sg_compare_revisions` |

**Decision logic:**
1. Know the exact symbol? → `sg_keyword_search`
2. Know the concept, not the name? → `sg_nls_search`
3. Need definition of a symbol? → `sg_go_to_definition`
4. Need all callers/references? → `sg_find_references`
5. Need full file content? → `sg_read_file`

## Scoping (Always Do This)

```
repo:^github.com/ORG/REPO$           # Exact repo (preferred)
repo:github.com/ORG/                 # All repos in org
file:.*\.ts$                         # TypeScript only
file:src/api/                        # Specific directory
```

Start narrow. Expand only if results are empty.

## Efficiency Rules

- Chain searches logically: search → read → references → definition
- Don't re-search for the same pattern; use results from prior calls
- Prefer `sg_keyword_search` over `sg_nls_search` when you have exact terms
- Read 2-3 related files before synthesising, rather than one at a time
- Don't read 20+ remote files without writing code — once you understand the pattern, start implementing

## If Stuck

If MCP search returns no results:
1. Broaden the search query (synonyms, partial identifiers)
2. Try `sg_nls_search` for semantic matching
3. Use `sg_list_files` to browse the directory structure
4. Use `sg_list_repos` to verify the repository name

---

# Java Dependency Injection with Kafka Plugin Architecture

## Your Task

Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the plugin/extension loading system: the PluginClassLoader, the plugin scanning via reflection, and the interface-based dependency injection used for Connector, Converter, and HeaderConverter plugins.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/kafka--0753c489, sg-evals/flink--0cc95fcc, sg-evals/camel--1006f047.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/kafka--0753c489` (apache/kafka)
- `sg-evals/flink--0cc95fcc` (apache/flink)
- `sg-evals/camel--1006f047` (apache/camel)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the plugin/extension loading system. Let me start by exploring the repository structure.
Now let me compile all the findings and create the answer.json file:

Perfect! I've successfully completed the task. I've created a comprehensive `answer.json` file at `/workspace/answer.json` that documents all Java source files implementing Apache Kafka's plugin/extension loading system.

## Summary of Findings:

The Apache Kafka plugin architecture consists of **31 core Java source files** organized into three categories:

### 1. **Plugin Loading Infrastructure (17 files)**
- Class isolation via `PluginClassLoader`, `DelegatingClassLoader`, and factory classes
- Plugin scanning through `ReflectionScanner` (ClassGraph-based) and `ServiceLoaderScanner` (ServiceLoader-based)
- Plugin metadata management with `PluginDesc`, `PluginSource`, `PluginType`, and `PluginScanResult`

### 2. **Plugin Interface Definitions (11 files)**
Defines pluggable interfaces for dependency injection:
- **Connectors**: `Connector`, `SinkConnector`, `SourceConnector`
- **Serialization**: `Converter`, `HeaderConverter`
- **Transformations**: `Transformation`, `Predicate`
- **Extensions**: `ConnectRestExtension`, `ConfigProvider`, `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy`

### 3. **Configuration & Support (3 files)**
- `WorkerConfig` - Plugin configuration properties
- `ConfigProvider` - External configuration support
- `LoaderSwap` - Thread-safe classloader context switching

The answer includes detailed symbols for each key class/interface and describes the complete chain of plugin initialization, discovery, and instantiation through methods like `initLoaders()`, `discoverPlugins()`, and `installDiscoveredPlugins()`.

  "text": "Apache Kafka's plugin/extension loading system is implemented through a sophisticated class isolation and dependency injection architecture located primarily in the connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ package and related connect/api package.\n\n**Core Plugin Loading Infrastructure:**\nThe system uses three key classloaders: PluginClassLoader (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java) extends URLClassLoader and loads plugin classes with isolation, DelegatingClassLoader (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) extends URLClassLoader to coordinate plugin loading, and ClassLoaderFactory (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java) which implements PluginClassLoaderFactory (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java) to create classloader instances.\n\n**Plugin Scanning via Reflection:**\nPlugin discovery uses two parallel scanning mechanisms: ReflectionScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java) uses ClassGraph library with reflection to scan all classes implementing plugin interfaces, and ServiceLoaderScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java) uses Java's ServiceLoader mechanism for META-INF/services discovery. Both extend PluginScanner (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java) and return PluginScanResult (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java) containing discovered plugin descriptors.\n\n**Plugin Descriptors and Type System:**\nEach discovered plugin is represented as a PluginDesc (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java) generic descriptor containing class information and version metadata. PluginType (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java) enum defines supported plugin categories: SOURCE, SINK, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, CONFIGPROVIDER, REST_EXTENSION, and CONNECTOR_CLIENT_POLICY. PluginSource (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java) record represents a plugin location with its associated classloader and URLs.\n\n**Interface-Based Dependency Injection:**\nThe system supports dependency injection through standard Java interfaces defined in connect/api. Core connector interfaces are Connector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java) base interface, SinkConnector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java) and SourceConnector (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java) for data movement. Serialization plugins include Converter (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java) for schema and payload conversion, and HeaderConverter (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java) for header conversion.\n\nTransformation plugins include Transformation (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java) for record transformations, and Predicate (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java) for conditional transformation application. Extension plugins include ConnectRestExtension (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java) registered with ConnectRestExtensionContext (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtensionContext.java), ConfigProvider (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java) for external configuration, and ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java) for enforcing client configuration policies.\n\n**Plugin Management and Utility Classes:**\nThe Plugins class (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade managing plugin initialization, discovery, and instantiation. PluginUtils (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java) provides helper methods including shouldLoadInIsolation() for determining isolation requirements, isConcrete() for validation, and pluginLocations() for path parsing. PluginDiscoveryMode (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) enum controls whether to use reflection scanning (ONLY_SCAN), service loading, or hybrid modes (HYBRID_WARN, HYBRID_FAIL, SERVICE_LOAD). LoaderSwap (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java) provides thread-safe context classloader swapping during plugin operations.\n\n**Configuration:**\nWorkerConfig (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/WorkerConfig.java) defines plugin-related configuration properties including PLUGIN_PATH_CONFIG, PLUGIN_DISCOVERY_CONFIG for discovery mode selection, and REST_EXTENSION_CLASSES_CONFIG. Additional metadata classes include VersionedPluginLoadingException (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java) for version-related errors and PluginsRecommenders (sg-evals/kafka--0753c489/connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) for configuration recommendations."
}
